title: 10 Years of Science at Tetiaroa
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d14sm","text":"This is a protocol documenting the proposed approach to conducting a scientific research review at a field station. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Identify the projects with Tetiaroa Ecostation leadership, staff, and researchers
Review the RAMS applications for each project

Create (or update) a landing page for the project with a DOI, a short description, and connections to the team, their affiliations, funding, keywords, and the field station. These projects will show up in the DataCite Commons page for the Tetiaroa Society: https://commons.datacite.org/ror.org/04p8xrf95
Begin draft of review paper for the project using the template attached
creator: Erin Robinson
